theme: Build the largest self-counting number table
title: Twin-Row Tally Tableau
strategies: round-robin fill: cycle column index mod base through the free cells, ignore the self-reference constraints entirely

synchronous recount-and-rewrite: repeatedly overwrite every counter cell with the digit count computed from the previous grid (Jacobi fixed-point iteration), which can 2-cycle forever on cross-row-paired counters

single-cell coordinate descent with O(1) incremental recount: since changing one free cell's digit changes exactly two digit tallies (old digit down, new digit up), evaluate each candidate digit's exact marginal effect on the weighted-satisfied total and only ever take non-decreasing moves, sweeping to a monotone fixpoint
weighted local search restarts from different deterministic sweep orders to escape shallow local fixpoints
